title: Bridge Essay: Decoding Inner Speech Using Electrocorticography: Progress and Challenges Toward

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Language as mantra — mantra meditation, inner speech, focused attention, verbal repetition.

**Decoding Inner Speech Using Electrocorticography: Progress and Challenges Toward a Speech Prosthesis.** — Front Neurosci. PMID: 29977189. DOI: 10.3389/fnins.2018.00422. Certain brain disorders resulting from brainstem infarcts, traumatic brain injury, cerebral palsy, stroke, and amyotrophic lateral sclerosis, limit verbal communication despite the patient being fully aware. People that cannot communicate due to neurological disorders would benefit from asystem that can infer internal speech directly from brain signals. In this review article, we describe the state of the art in decoding inner speech, ranging from early acoustic sound features, to higher order...
